included in view_reader module with ViewReaderType defined as templateincluded in view_reader module with ViewReaderType defined as template

Imports

reader_common

Types

BufferView = object
  data*: ptr UncheckedArray[char]
  len*: int
Source   Edit   
StateView = ptr ReadState
Source   Edit   
TrackedStateView = ptr TrackedReadState
Source   Edit   
TrackedViewReader = object
  bufferView*: BufferView
  statePtr*: TrackedStateView
same as ViewReader but optionally tracks line/column Source   Edit   
ViewedState = viewed(ReadState)
Source   Edit   
ViewedTrackedState = viewed(TrackedReadState)
Source   Edit   
ViewReader = object
  bufferView*: BufferView
  statePtr*: StateView
reader over a string view, to reduce pointer dereferences Source   Edit
